name: strata
description: Repo-owned project memory for AI coding agents, with immediate capture, save/load workflows, and migration-safe initialization.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-owned memory for AI coding sessions
interface.longDescription: Use Strata to initialize, load, capture, save, and migrate plain Markdown project memory under .strata/ so multiple AI coding agents can share one project state.
defaultPrompt: Set up Strata memory in this repo.
Load Strata state and continue the last task.
Capture this failure as Strata memory.
